ucs.title: [LLM] INC Ransom (GOLD IONIC) — RDP lateral movement followed by PSExec/WMIC execution and Volume Shadow Copy wipe
ucs.description: Hunts INC Ransom's signature post-compromise chain: stolen valid creds used over RDP → SMB admin-share / PSExec / WMIC pivot to a second host → vssadmin/wmic shadow-copy deletion immediately before encryption. Mandiant and Huntress reporting on INC/GOLD IONIC consistently shows this exact sequence (T1078 → T1021.001/T1021.002 + T1047/T1569.002 → T1490 prior to T1486). The narrow time-window correlation between the inbound RDP/SMB session and a destructive shadow-copy command is the highest-fidelity INC behaviour available before files start encrypting.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as RemoteAuthTime from datamodel=Authentication.Authentication where (Authentication.action=success AND (Authentication.authentication_method=NTLM OR Authentication.authentication_method=Kerberos) AND (Authentication.signature_id=4624 AND (Authentication.LogonType=3 OR Authentication.LogonType=10))) by Authentication.dest Authentication.user Authentication.src | rename Authentication.dest as dest Authentication.user as user Authentication.src as src | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as ProcTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_name) as proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name=vssadmin.exe AND Processes.process=*delete* AND Processes.process=*shadows*) OR (Processes.process_name=wmic.exe AND Processes.process=*shadowcopy* AND Processes.process=*delete*) OR (Processes.process_name=psexec.exe OR Processes.process_name=psexesvc.exe OR Processes.process_name=paexec.exe) OR (Processes.parent_process_name=services.exe AND Processes.process_name=cmd.exe AND Processes.process=*\\\\*\admin$*)) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time | rename Processes.dest as dest Processes.user as procuser ] | eval delta_min=round((ProcTime-RemoteAuthTime)/60,1) | where delta_min>=0 AND delta_min<=30 | table RemoteAuthTime ProcTime delta_min src dest user procuser proc parent cmdline | sort - ProcTime
ucs.kql:
// INC Ransom — inbound remote logon (RDP/SMB) followed within 30 min by
// PsExec/WMIC service execution and/or shadow-copy deletion on the same host.
let Lookback = 14d;
let WindowMin = 30;
let RemoteLogons =
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
    | where LogonType in ("RemoteInteractive", "Network")    // RDP or SMB/admin-share
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
    | project AuthTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              AccountDomain, RemoteIP, RemoteDeviceName, LogonType, Protocol;
let IncDestructive =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where
        // Shadow-copy destruction (T1490) — INC pre-encryption staple
        (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
        // PsExec / paexec / remote service execution (T1569.002, T1021.002)
        or (FileName in~ ("psexec.exe","psexec64.exe","psexesvc.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","remcom.exe"))
        // WMIC remote process create (T1047) used by INC for lateral exec
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "process"
            and ProcessCommandLine has "call" and ProcessCommandLine has "create"
            and ProcessCommandLine has "/node:")
        // BITSAdmin staging — INC observed using to fetch tooling post-pivot
        or (FileName =~ "bitsadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "transfer")
    | project ProcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName,
              InitiatingProcessCommandLine, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession=InitiatingProcessFolderPath;
IncDestructive
| join kind=inner RemoteLogons on DeviceId
| where ProcTime between (AuthTime .. AuthTime + WindowMin * 1m)
| extend DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', ProcTime, AuthTime)
| project AuthTime, ProcTime, DelayMin, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountName1,
          RemoteIP, RemoteDeviceName, LogonType, Protocol,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// INC Ransom — RDP/SMB remote logon followed by PsExec/WMIC/shadow-copy
// destruction on the same host within 30 minutes.
let Lookback = 14d;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let RemoteLogons =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4624
    | where LogonType in (3, 10)            // 3 = Network (SMB/admin-share), 10 = RDP
    | where AccountType == "User"
    | where TargetUserName !endswith "$"
    | project AuthTime = TimeGenerated, Computer,
              TargetUserName, TargetDomainName,
              IpAddress, WorkstationName,
              AuthPkg = AuthenticationPackageName, LogonType;
let IncDestructive =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User"
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1])),
             CmdLow = tolower(CommandLine)
    | where (Bin == "vssadmin.exe" and CmdLow has "delete" and CmdLow has "shadows")
         or (Bin == "wmic.exe" and CmdLow has "shadowcopy" and CmdLow has "delete")
         or (Bin in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and (CmdLow has "win32_shadowcopy" or CmdLow has "remove-wmiobject win32_shadowcopy"))
         or (Bin in ("psexec.exe","psexec64.exe","psexesvc.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","remcom.exe"))
         or (Bin == "wmic.exe" and CmdLow has "/node:" and CmdLow has "process"
             and CmdLow has "call" and CmdLow has "create")
         or (Bin == "bitsadmin.exe" and CmdLow has "transfer")
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Bin,
              NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
IncDestructive
| join kind=inner RemoteLogons on Computer
| where ProcTime between (AuthTime .. AuthTime + WindowMin)
| extend DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', ProcTime, AuthTime)
| project AuthTime, ProcTime, DelayMin, Computer,
          RemoteUser = TargetUserName, RemoteDomain = TargetDomainName,
          IpAddress, WorkstationName, LogonType, AuthPkg,
          Bin, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, Account
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.rationale: INC Ransom's intrusion playbook (per Huntress, SentinelOne, and Mandiant GOLD IONIC reporting) is consistently: valid-credential RDP/SMB pivot → service-based remote execution (PsExec / WMIC process call create) → vssadmin/wmic shadow-copy wipe → encryption. Each component alone is noisy or benign (admins legitimately RDP, vssadmin runs in some backup workflows, PsExec exists on jump boxes), but t

ucs.title: [LLM] INC Ransom — MEGA / RClone exfiltration over HTTPS prior to encryption (double-extortion T1567/T1537)
ucs.description: Hunts the data-staging-and-exfil step that defines INC Ransom's double-extortion model. Public IR reporting (NCC/Fox-IT, Huntress, SentinelOne) shows INC consistently using rclone.exe (often renamed) and/or MEGAsync/MEGAcmd to push collected data to MEGA, pCloud, or attacker-controlled S3/Azure buckets in the hours before deploying the encryptor. The detection looks for rclone-style command lines and outbound TLS to MEGA/pCloud/transfer.sh from non-browser processes — pivot points unique to this exfil tradecraft.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents min(_time) as firstSeen max(_time) as lastSeen from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process=*rclone* OR Processes.process=*megacmd* OR Processes.process=*MEGAcmdServer* OR Processes.process=*megasync* OR (Processes.process=*copy* AND Processes.process=*--transfers*) OR (Processes.process=*--multi-thread-streams*) OR (Processes.process=*mega:* AND Processes.process=*remote*) OR Processes.process=*pcloud* OR Processes.process=*--config* AND Processes.process=*--no-check-certificate*) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | rename Processes.* as * | append [ | tstats summariesonly=true count values(All_Traffic.app) as apps values(All_Traffic.dest) as dests sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_port=443 AND (All_Traffic.dest=*mega.nz OR All_Traffic.dest=*mega.co.nz OR All_Traffic.dest=*megaupload* OR All_Traffic.dest=*pcloud.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*transfer.sh OR All_Traffic.dest=*anonfiles.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*gofile.io OR All_Traffic.dest=*userstorage.mega.co.nz)) by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.app | rename All_Traffic.src as dest All_Traffic.user as user All_Traffic.app as process_name | where bytes_out > 104857600 ] | stats values(process_name) as procs values(cmdlines) as cmdlines values(parents) as parents values(dests) as exfil_dests sum(bytes_out) as bytes_out min(firstSeen) as firstSeen max(lastSeen) as lastSeen by dest user | where mvcount(procs) > 0 | sort - bytes_out
ucs.kql:
// INC Ransom — rclone / MEGA / pCloud staging + outbound TLS to known
// double-extortion exfil endpoints. Two halves joined on DeviceId.
let Lookback = 7d;
let ExfilDomains = dynamic([
    "mega.nz","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","megaupload.com",
    "pcloud.com","transfer.sh","anonfiles.com","gofile.io",
    "filebin.net","send.exploit.in","tmpfiles.org"
]);
let RcloneLikeProcs =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend CmdLow = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | where
        // rclone (often renamed) — switch fingerprint is more reliable than file name
        FileName matches regex @"(?i)^(rclone|svchost|winupdate|backup|sync|mega).*\.exe$"
        and (CmdLow has_any (
            " copy ", " sync ", " move ", "--transfers", "--multi-thread-streams",
            "--config", "--no-check-certificate", "mega:", "pcloud:",
            "--ignore-existing", "--max-age", "--bwlimit"))
        // MEGA-native clients
        or FileName in~ ("megasync.exe","megacmdserver.exe","megaclient.exe","mega-cmd.exe")
        // 7-zip with password — INC stages encrypted archives before exfil
        or (FileName in~ ("7z.exe","7za.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe")
            and CmdLow matches regex @"-p[\S]{6,}" and CmdLow has_any (" a ", " u "))
    | project ProcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              FileName, FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine,
              SHA256, InitiatingProcessFileName;
let ExfilNet =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where RemotePort in (443, 80)
    | where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any (ExfilDomains)
       or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("rclone.exe","megasync.exe","megacmdserver.exe",
                                          "megaclient.exe","mega-cmd.exe")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe",
                                             "brave.exe","opera.exe","iexplore.exe",
                                             "safari.exe","arc.exe")
    | summarize NetEvents = count(),
                FirstNet = min(Timestamp), LastNet = max(Timestamp),
                Dests = make_set(RemoteUrl, 25),
                NetProc = any(InitiatingProcessFileName)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName;
RcloneLikeProcs
| join kind=inner ExfilNet on DeviceId
| project ProcTime, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName,
          ProcessCommandLine, SHA256, NetProc,
          NetEvents, FirstNet, LastNet, Dests
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// INC Ransom — rclone / MEGA / pCloud staging + exfil to cloud-storage
// endpoints. Combine SecurityEvent 4688 with CommonSecurityLog (FW/proxy).
let Lookback = 7d;
let ExfilDomains = dynamic([
    "mega.nz","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","megaupload.com",
    "pcloud.com","transfer.sh","anonfiles.com","gofile.io",
    "filebin.net","tmpfiles.org"
]);
let RcloneLikeProcs =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Bin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1])),
             CmdLow = tolower(CommandLine)
    | where
        (Bin matches regex @"^(rclone|svchost|winupdate|backup|sync|mega).*\.exe$"
         and (CmdLow has_any (" copy "," sync "," move ","--transfers",
              "--multi-thread-streams","--config","--no-check-certificate",
              "mega:","pcloud:","--ignore-existing","--bwlimit")))
     or (Bin in ("megasync.exe","megacmdserver.exe","megaclient.exe","mega-cmd.exe"))
     or (Bin in ("7z.exe","7za.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe")
         and CmdLow matches regex @"-p[\S]{6,}" and CmdLow has_any (" a "," u "))
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Bin,
              NewProcessName, CommandLine;
let ExfilNet =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where DeviceAction !in~ ("deny","drop","block")
    | where DestinationPort in (443, 80)
    | where ipv4_is_private(DestinationIP) == false
    | where (isnotempty(RequestURL) and RequestURL has_any (ExfilDomains))
         or (isnotempty(DestinationHostName) and DestinationHostName has_any (ExfilDomains))
    | summarize NetEvents = count(),
                FirstNet = min(TimeGenerated), LastNet = max(TimeGenerated),
                BytesOut = sum(toint(SentBytes)),
                Dests = make_set(coalesce(DestinationHostName, RequestURL), 25)
            by Computer = coalesce(SourceHostName, DeviceName);
RcloneLikeProcs
| join kind=inner ExfilNet on Computer
| where BytesOut > 50 * 1024 * 1024            // >50 MB outbound — staging-sized
| project ProcTime, Computer, Account, Bin, CommandLine,
          NetEvents, FirstNet, LastNet, BytesOut, Dests
| order by ProcTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: INC Ransom rclone/MEGA staging command line
id: 4f5b7d62-3a1c-4c9d-9b73-d6c0d8f2e911
status: experimental
description: Detects rclone or MEGA-CLI execution patterns characteristic of INC Ransom (GOLD IONIC) double-extortion data staging prior to encryption.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1032/
  - https://www.huntress.com/blog/investigating-new-inc-ransom-group-activity
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.exfiltration
  - attack.t1567
  - attack.t1537
  - attack.g1032
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_rclone_bin:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\rclone.exe'
      - '\megasync.exe'
      - '\megacmdserver.exe'
      - '\megaclient.exe'
      - '\mega-cmd.exe'
  selection_rclone_args:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--transfers'
      - '--multi-thread-streams'
      - '--no-check-certificate'
      - 'mega:'
      - 'pcloud:'
      - '--bwlimit'
  selection_renamed_rclone:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'mega:'
      - 'copy'
  filter_browsers:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
  condition: (selection_rclone_bin or selection_rclone_args or selection_renamed_rclone) and not filter_browsers
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate sysadmin or backup automation using rclone to MEGA/pCloud (rare in enterprise — should be allowlisted by host)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Double-extortion is the defining commercial model of INC Ransom; their leak site routinely publishes data within 24-48h of intrusion. IR write-ups (Huntress, SentinelOne, NCC) repeatedly identify rclone (sometimes renamed) and MEGA/MEGAcmd as INC's preferred exfil tooling — this is a stronger actor-fingerprint than the encryptor itself, which has been variant-shared with Lynx since mid-2024. Combi

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `DeviceName` is not a column of CommonSecurityLog, SecurityEvent; it does exist on DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceFileEvents, DeviceRegistryEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents, DeviceEvents, DeviceInfo, DeviceNetworkInfo, IdentityLogonEvents, IdentityQueryEvents, IdentityDirectoryEvents, DeviceTvmSoftwareInventory, DeviceTvmSoftwareVulnerabilities, AlertEvidence, AADSignInEventsBeta, ASCDeviceEvents.
